expectations.text: Characterization tests for existing handler behavior are written first (valid request succeeds, invalid JSON returns 400)
expectations.evidence: 3 characterization tests written and confirmed passing against unmodified handler: ValidRequest_Returns201WithUserJSON, InvalidJSON_Returns400, DatabaseError_Returns500. All 3 passed before any code changes.

expectations.text: A test list or plan is created before writing validation tests
expectations.evidence: Agent explicitly created test list: 'rejects invalid email format → 400', 'rejects empty name → 400', 'rejects whitespace-only name → 400', 'rejects name over 100 chars → 400', 'rejects password under 8 chars → 400', 'valid request still succeeds → 201'.

expectations.text: Validation tests are written BEFORE validation code is added to the handler
expectations.evidence: RED phase confirmed: all 6 validation tests failed with 'got 201' against unmodified handler. GREEN phase then added validateRegisterRequest() function.

expectations.text: A fake or stub UserStore is created for testing (not a mock framework)
expectations.evidence: stubUserStore struct at handler_test.go:16-18 with createUserFunc callback. No mock library imported.

expectations.text: Tests cover: invalid email format, empty name, name over 100 chars, password under 8 chars
expectations.evidence: All 4 rules covered plus bonus: InvalidEmail, EmptyName, WhitespaceOnlyName, NameOver100Chars, PasswordTooShort, PasswordExactly7Chars (boundary), PasswordExactly8Chars (boundary).

expectations.text: Tests verify the HTTP status code and error message for each validation failure
expectations.evidence: Tests verify HTTP status code (400) and that CreateUser was NOT called. However, error message text is NOT verified — assertValidationReject helper only checks rec.Code and createCalled, not response body content.

expectations.text: Valid requests still succeed after validation is added
expectations.evidence: Characterization test ValidRequest_Returns201WithUserJSON still passes. Additionally PasswordExactly8Chars_Returns201 verifies boundary valid case.

expectations.text: Each test tests one validation rule (not a single test checking all validations)
expectations.evidence: 7 separate test functions for validation, each testing exactly one scenario.

expectations.text: Validation logic is clean — not deeply nested if/else chains
expectations.evidence: Extracted validateRegisterRequest() function (handler.go:56-74) with sequential if/return guards. Clean separation of concerns.
